summary: Iteration 18 - 3 Correctifs Testing Complete. All backend APIs working (19/19 tests passed). Frontend verified: 5 new map layers visible, DVF cascade with source field, project_type completely removed, correct verdict labels (GO/A_ETUDIER/DEFAVORABLE/EXCLU), ScoreBar components showing breakdown.
passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS (19/19) ===
GET /api/ returns API info (version 1.0.0)
GET /api/france/gpu-zones returns industrial zones array
GET /api/map/electrical-assets returns postes with s3renr data for heatmap
GET /api/dvf/commune/{code_insee} returns DVF price data
GET /api/dvf/region/{region} returns aggregated DVF data
POST /api/chat returns parcels with dvf_source field (dvf_departement_hardcode)
GET /api/parcels works without project_type param
GET /api/map/parcels works without project_type param
GET /api/france/parcelles/bbox works without project_type param
GET /api/parcels/{id}/score works without project_type in URL
Score structure: score, verdict, detail (4 axes), flags, resume
Verdict labels: GO, A_ETUDIER, DEFAVORABLE, EXCLU (not CONDITIONNEL/NO_GO)
POST /api/export/pdf returns valid PDF
GET /api/map/dc returns 61 DC existants
GET /api/map/landing-points returns 8 landing points
GET /api/map/submarine-cables returns 15+ cables
GET /api/map/electrical-assets returns 101+ postes HTB
GET /api/map/rte-future-400kv returns GeoJSON with line + buffers
GET /api/s3renr/summary returns region data (IDF, PACA, HdF)
=== FRONTEND UI TESTS ===
Login page loads correctly with Google Auth button
Dashboard loads with map showing all infrastructure layers
5 new layer toggles visible: Zones industrielles, Heatmap MW dispo, Zones inondables, Cours d'eau, Réseau routier
Chatbot (Assistant IA) opens and accepts queries
Chatbot returns parcel results with dvf_source field
ScoreBar components visible in chatbot parcel cards (RTE, MW, PLU, Surface)
Parcel cards show: score/100, verdict label (À ÉTUDIER), resume text
Verdict labels correct: GO, À ÉTUDIER, DÉFAVORABLE (not CONDITIONNEL or NO_GO)
S3REnR summary visible in sidebar (IDF: SATURÉ, PACA: ACTIF, HdF: ACTIF)
Map zooms to PACA region when chatbot returns parcels
seed_data_creation: Created test user 'test-user-iteration18' with session for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified the 3 correctifs applied on top of the 9-step refactoring. Key changes verified: 1) 5 new map layers (Zones industrielles GPU, Heatmap MW S3REnR, Zones inondables, Cours d'eau WMS, Réseau routier) all visible in COUCHES dropdown. 2) DVF cascade working: API tries Cerema commune API first, falls back to departement hardcode, then region fallback. dvf_source field now returned in chat parcel results. 3) project_type completely removed from all API signatures - endpoints work without project_type param. Score format is {score, verdict, detail, flags, resume} with verdicts GO/A_ETUDIER/DEFAVORABLE/EXCLU. All APIs are live (no mocked APIs).

correctifs_verification.correctif_1_map_layers: VERIFIED - 5 new layers visible in COUCHES dropdown: Zones industrielles, Heatmap MW dispo, Zones inondables, Cours d'eau, Réseau routier
correctifs_verification.correctif_2_dvf_cascade: VERIFIED - DVF API cascade working (commune API -> dept hardcode -> region fallback), dvf_source field returned
correctifs_verification.correctif_3_project_type_cleanup: VERIFIED - project_type removed from all endpoints, Verdict enum updated to GO/A_ETUDIER/DEFAVORABLE/EXCLU

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - DVF uses real Cerema API with fallback to hardcoded data
